title: STAND BY ME - 211info
text: ALBANY OFFICE STAND BY ME Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF One-on-one financial coaching to set financial goals and make individualized plans to achieve those goals. Financial coaches can provide encouragement; help with the basics of personal finance; assist, develop, and maintain healthy financial habits; offer credit counseling; provide accountability tools; and connect clients with resources and experts. 1400 Queen Avenue SE Suite 201 Albany, OR 97322 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 924-8440 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 924-8440 se habla espanol Alicia Lucke [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Benton, Lincoln, Linn, and Marion Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located between Geary Street and Hill Street in a 2-story red brick building Services: Credit Counseling Financial Literacy Training Personal Financial Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - OHP AND SNAP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE TRANSPORTATION - CASCADES WEST RIDE LINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
